email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme solliciteer ik naar de stage Marketing - Media & CRM bij Bellerose. Als junior digital marketer met ervaring in SEO, contentbeheer en campagne-analyse, ben ik gemotiveerd om bij te dragen aan jullie media- en CRM-activiteiten.

In mijn huidige rol bij Episto voer ik on-page SEO uit, beheer ik Google Ads en analyseer ik prestaties met tools zoals Google Analytics en SEMrush. Daarnaast heb ik met mijn eigen project mirook.com ervaring opgedaan met gestructureerde data en technische SEO, wat aansluit bij de data-gedreven aanpak van deze stage.

Ik ben leergierig, analytisch en werk graag in teamverband. Mijn kennis van Excel en digitale advertentieplatforms wil ik graag verder ontwikkelen bij Bellerose. Ik spreek Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (met wekelijkse lessen).

Ik kijk ernaar uit om mijn motivatie in een gesprek toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear team,

I am very excited to apply for the Marketing - Media & CRM internship at Bellerose. As a junior digital marketer with experience in SEO, content management, and campaign analysis, I am motivated to contribute to your media and CRM activities.

In my current role at Episto, I perform on-page SEO, manage Google Ads, and analyze performance using tools like Google Analytics and SEMrush. Additionally, my own project mirook.com has given me experience with structured data and technical SEO, aligning with the data-driven approach of this internship.

I am curious, analytical, and enjoy teamwork. My Excel skills and knowledge of digital advertising platforms are ready to be further developed at Bellerose. I speak English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (with weekly lessons).

I look forward to discussing my motivation in an interview.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme solliciteer ik naar de stage Marketing - Media & CRM bij Bellerose. Jullie oproep voor een gemotiveerde en nieuwsgierige stagiair sluit naadloos aan bij mijn profiel als junior digital marketer met een passie voor datagedreven marketing.

In mijn huidige functie bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor on-page SEO, het schrijven van keyword-gerichte content en het beheren van Google Ads-campagnes. Ik analyseer prestaties met tools zoals Google Analytics, SEMrush en Ahrefs, en optimaliseer op basis van KPI's zoals ROAS en conversieratio. Deze ervaring sluit direct aan bij de media campaign management en performance analysis die jullie beschrijven.

Daarnaast heb ik met mijn eigen project mirook.com gewerkt aan gestructureerde data (JSON-LD schema) en technische SEO, wat mijn analytische vaardigheden en oog voor detail versterkt. Ik ben gewend om zelfstandig te werken, maar ook om in teamverband resultaten te behalen.

Jullie nadruk op een open geest, autonomie en groeimogelijkheden spreekt me aan. Ik ben leergierig en pas me snel aan nieuwe tools aan. Mijn kennis van Excel en digitale advertentieplatforms (Google Ads, Meta Ads) wil ik graag verder verdiepen bij Bellerose. Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (met wekelijkse lessen).

Ik kijk ernaar uit om mijn vaardigheden in te zetten voor jullie merk en tegelijkertijd veel te leren van jullie team.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear team,

I am very excited to apply for the Marketing - Media & CRM internship at Bellerose. Your call for a motivated and curious intern aligns perfectly with my profile as a junior digital marketer passionate about data-driven marketing.

In my current role at Episto, I am responsible for on-page SEO, writing keyword-targeted content, and managing Google Ads campaigns. I analyze performance using tools like Google Analytics, SEMrush, and Ahrefs, and optimize based on KPIs such as ROAS and conversion rate. This experience directly relates to the media campaign management and performance analysis you describe.

Additionally, my own project mirook.com has given me experience with structured data (JSON-LD schema) and technical SEO, strengthening my analytical skills and attention to detail. I am used to working independently but also achieving results in a team.

Your emphasis on an open mind, autonomy, and growth opportunities appeals to me. I am eager to learn and quick to adapt to new tools. My knowledge of Excel and digital advertising platforms (Google Ads, Meta Ads) I would like to deepen at Bellerose. I speak fluent English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (with weekly lessons).

I look forward to contributing my skills to your brand while learning a lot from your team.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
- Hands-on experience with Google Ads campaign management and performance analysis (ROAS, CPA, conversion rate) at Episto
- Proficient in Excel, Google Analytics, SEMrush, and Ahrefs for KPI tracking and reporting
- Built and optimized websites with structured data (JSON-LD) and technical SEO, demonstrating analytical and detail-oriented approach
- Independent and curious learner, with a technical foundation in web design and content management
- Strong interest in digital marketing and CRM, with B1 Dutch and weekly lessons to improve
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with hands-on experience in media campaign management, performance analysis, and SEO. At Episto, I manage Google Ads campaigns, track KPIs (ROAS, CPA, conversion rate), and optimize based on data insights. I also write keyword-targeted content and build WordPress sites. On my own project (mirook.com), I implemented structured data and technical SEO audits. Comfortable with Excel, analytics tools, and digital advertising platforms. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- Media Campaign Management: Google Ads, campaign launches, budget monitoring, audience targeting, content creation
- Performance Analysis: KPI extraction (ROAS, CPA, conversion rate), weekly/monthly reporting, optimization recommendations
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO
- Analytics & Reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Excel
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Manage Google Ads campaigns: launch, budget monitoring, audience targeting, and performance optimization
- Track and report KPIs (ROAS, CPA, conversion rate) using Google Analytics, SEMrush, and Ahrefs
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
